title: Expressions, Control Flow, Iteration, Switches, and Deferred Work · Go Semantics Case: If Initializers
summary: A retry policy must classify states, bound attempts, accumulate evidence, and guarantee cleanup across early returns. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go if initializers increment in a bounded retry and classification engine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
